extract_schema.description: Standard extract schema for books.toscrape.com — used in Step 5 (Extract) tests
extract_schema.prompt: Extract a list of books from this page. For each book capture: book_title, price, star_rating (as a word like One/Two/Three/Four/Five), and availability.
